notes: A faint dot appears under the patah on the vav. It is not likely to be part of the text.
BHL has the ole over the lamed. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Move the meteg from under the het to under the kaf.
refuni: tav dagesh vav holam kaf qamats het meteg vav holam tav sof-pasuq
changeuni: tav dagesh vav holam kaf qamats meteg het vav holam tav sof-pasuq
notes: BHL has the meteg under the het. BHL Appendix A has the meteg following the qamats under the kaf.

description: Change meteg under the mem to tipeha.
refuni: mem tsere meteg het patah tet dagesh qamats alef tav hiriq meteg yod sof-pasuq
changeuni: mem tsere tipeha het patah tet dagesh qamats alef tav hiriq meteg yod sof-pasuq
notes: BHL has a tipeha (acting as a tarha) following the tsere under the mem. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Move etnahta from under the yod to under the mem.
refuni: yod segol he hataf-segol mem qamats yod etnahta vav dagesh final-nun
changeuni: yod segol he hataf-segol mem qamats etnahta yod vav dagesh final-nun
notes: BHL has the etnahta under the yod. BHL Appendix A has the etnahta under the mem.

description: Move the ole from over the tav to over the het.
refuni: tav dagesh segol ole het hataf-segol resh patah merkha shin shin-dot
changeuni: tav dagesh segol het hataf-segol ole resh patah merkha shin shin-dot
notes: BHL has the ole over the het. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi on vav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi bet patah lamed dagesh patah yod sheva lamed qamats he
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha bet patah lamed dagesh patah yod sheva lamed qamats he
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark is not prepositive and is transcribed as a tipeha.
BHL has a dehi on the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change yerah-ben-yomo under the lamed to mahapakh.
refuni: lamed holam yerah-ben-yomo alef
changeuni: lamed holam mahapakh alef
notes: BHL has a mahapakh under the lamed. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move ole over kaf to bet.
refuni: yod sheva meteg kaf patah ole bet dagesh sheva dalet qamats merkha nun sheva nun hiriq yod
changeuni: yod sheva meteg kaf patah bet dagesh sheva ole dalet qamats merkha nun sheva nun hiriq yod
notes: BHL has an ole over the bet. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change tipeha under second vav to merkha.
refuni: vav patah alef hataf-patah qof patah vav dagesh segol tipeha he
changeuni: vav patah alef hataf-patah qof patah vav dagesh segol merkha he
notes: The mark under the second vav has a slight twist to the left at the lower end making it a merkha. It certainly does not have the southeast-to-northwest inclination to be a tipeha.
The ill-formed reddish dot under the patah under the qof is probably a blemish.
BHL has a merkha under the second vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg under pe to merkha; remove maqaf at end of word.
refuni: pe dagesh qamats meteg het hataf-patah dalet vav dagesh maqaf
changeuni: pe dagesh qamats merkha het hataf-patah dalet vav dagesh
notes: The near-vertical line under the pe has a slight twist to the left at the lower end making it a merkha.
The geresh-like, northeast-to-southwest diagonal line after the vav is likely a spacer to maintain line justification.
BHL has a merkha under the pe and no maqaf at the end of the word. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move ole over second he to yod. Add note 't'.
refuni: he qamats atnah-hafukh yod qamats he ole
changeuni: he qamats atnah-hafukh yod qamats ole he
notes: The ole appears between the yod and the second he. Because space is available to place the ole centered on the second he, the ole will be moved to the yod.
BHL has an ole over the yod. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Replace dehi under vav with tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi mem hiriq resh sheva mem qamats he
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha mem hiriq resh sheva mem qamats he
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark is not prepositive, even though space is available to write it prepositively.
BHL has a dehi under the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg under resh to merkha.
refuni: ayin dehi vav dagesh resh qamats meteg he
changeuni: ayin dehi vav dagesh resh qamats merkha he
notes: The accent under the resh is a very well inclined merkha. Its smudged background suggests that a meteg had been erased and written over.
BHL has a meteg under the resh. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Replace dehi under the ayin with a tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: ayin dehi vav holam lamed qamats final-mem
changeuni: ayin tipeha vav holam lamed qamats final-mem
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available for the writer to have written the mark prepositively.
BHL has a dehi under the ayin. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg under he to merkha.
refuni: tav dagesh sheva he meteg vav holam tav sheva tav munah vav dagesh
changeuni: tav dagesh sheva he merkha vav holam tav sheva tav munah vav dagesh
notes: BHL has a merkha under the he. BHL Appendix A has no note for this word; it has a note for word 11.

description: Move meteg from yod to vav.
refuni: he patah dalet dagesh sheva het vav dagesh yod meteg combining-grapheme-joiner qamats he sof-pasuq
changeuni: he patah dalet dagesh sheva het vav dagesh meteg yod qamats he sof-pasuq
notes: BHL has the meteg following the qamats under the yod. BHL Appendix A has the meteg under the vav; the qamats remains on the yod.

description: Add merkha after qamats on yod.
refuni: yod qamats ayin hataf-patah tsadi munah vav dagesh
changeuni: yod qamats merkha ayin hataf-patah tsadi munah vav dagesh
notes: BHL has a merkha following the qamats under the yod. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move meteg from the second tav to under the lamed; the meteg follows the qamats on the lamed.
refuni: tav dagesh sheva he hiriq lamed dagesh qamats tav meteg vav holam sof-pasuq
changeuni: tav dagesh sheva he hiriq lamed dagesh qamats meteg tav vav holam sof-pasuq
notes: BHL has the meteg under the second tav. BHL Appendix A has the meteg following the qamats under the lamed.

description: Add maqaf between alef and resh. Add note 'c'.
refuni: yod qamats mahapakh alef tsere merkha resh
changeuni: yod qamats mahapakh alef tsere merkha maqaf resh
notes: The word has a masora circle on it. The masora notes may explain this odd marking.
BHL has no maqaf after or in this word. BHL Appendix A has a maqaf between the alef and the resh.

description: Replace dehi under the mem with tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: mem dehi vav dagesh zayin qamats resh
changeuni: mem tipeha vav dagesh zayin qamats resh
notes: The dehi/tipeha under the mem is not very prepositive and will be transcribed as a tipeha.
BHL has a dehi under the mem. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move hiriq then etnachta from vav to he. Add note 'c'.
refuni: yod sheva he vav hiriq etnahta he
changeuni: yod sheva he hiriq etnahta vav he
notes: The Etnahta and Hiriq appear to be under the first he.
BHL has a hiriq and then etnachta under the vav. BHL Appendix A has a hiriq and then etnachta under the he. The BHL Appendix A note has a question mark in parentheses.

description: Change dehi under vav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi mem tsere het qamats mem qamats samekh
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha mem tsere het qamats mem qamats samekh
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark is not prepositive and will be transcribed as a tipeha. Space is available to make this mark prepositive.
BHL has a dehi under the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under alef to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: alef dehi vav holam yod tsere bet
changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam yod tsere bet
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the alef is not prepositive. On the other hand, very little space was available to write it prepositively due to the previous word's tav and the following line's lamed ascender.
BHL has a dehi under the alef. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Add merkha after hiriq-then-meteg under dalet. Add note 'c'.
refuni: tsadi patah dalet dagesh hiriq meteg yod qof sof-pasuq
changeuni: tsadi patah dalet dagesh hiriq meteg merkha yod qof sof-pasuq
notes: The meteg is imperfect, but expected. The merkha is well-positioned, well-sized, and well-shaped; it is clearer than the meteg. This is an unexpected marking.
BHL has a hiriq followed by a meteg under the dalet. BHL Appendix A has a hiriq-then-meteg-then merkha under the dalet.

description: Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: lamed sheva alef hiriq mem sheva resh tsere yod maqaf
changeuni: lamed sheva alef hiriq mem sheva resh tsere yod
notes: BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHL Appendix A has no maqaf at the end of this word.

description: Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: mem patah meteg ayin patah lamed sheva lamed tsere yod maqaf
changeuni: mem patah meteg ayin patah lamed sheva lamed tsere yod
notes: No maqaf is present between the yod at the end of this word and the alef at the start of the next word. A smudge between these consonants suggests a possible erasure.
BHL has no maqaf at the end of this word. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Remove meteg from under the nun. Add note 'c'.
refuni: nun tsere meteg dalet sof-pasuq
changeuni: nun tsere dalet sof-pasuq
notes: A meteg (acting as a siluq) should occur at the end of each verse.
BHL has a meteg under the nun. BHL Appendix A has no meteg under the nun.

description: Change dehi to tipeha under the ayin. Add note 'd'.
refuni: ayin dehi vav holam dalet
changeuni: ayin tipeha vav holam dalet
notes: The dehi/tipeha accent under the ayin is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has dehi under the ayin. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi to merkha under zayin.
refuni: zayin holam dehi alef tav
changeuni: zayin holam merkha alef tav
notes: This merkha is very slightly inclined northeast-to-southwest; however, it will be transcribed as a merkha rather than a meteg.
BHL has a merkha under the zayin. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move the ole from over the he to over the bet.
refuni: he hataf-segol ole bet hiriq yod alef merkha vav holam
changeuni: he hataf-segol bet hiriq ole yod alef merkha vav holam
notes: BHL has the ole over the bet. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Add dehi to tav. Add note 't'.
refuni: tav dagesh hiriq bet sheva ayin patah merkha resh
changeuni: tav dagesh hiriq dehi bet sheva ayin patah merkha resh
notes: Under the tav a dehi appears followed by a disturbed area. The putative dehi is heavier and longer than expected; its width varies along its length. The disturbed area might contain a hiriq, a sheva, or a broken meteg. The upper diffuse dot following the dehi is probably the right, lower part of the tav; the lower diffuse dot following the dehi is probably a hiriq.

BHL has a meteg after a hiriq under the tav. BHL Appendix A gives two alternatives for the marks under the tav; both alternatives have a '?' in parentheses. One marking has a dehi followed by a hiriq; the other has a meteg before a hiriq.

description: Move meteg under nun to under the dalet. Remove CGJ. Add note 'c'.
refuni: alef hataf-patah dalet holam nun meteg combining-grapheme-joiner qamats yod sof-pasuq
changeuni: alef hataf-patah dalet holam meteg nun qamats yod sof-pasuq
notes: This is an unexpected marking of a common word.
BHL has a qamats followed by a meteg under the nun. BHL Appendix A has a meteg under the dalet and a qamats under the nun.

description: Change dehi under qof to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: qof holam dehi resh patah het
changeuni: qof holam tipeha resh patah het
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the qof is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has dehi under the qof. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Add geresh muqdam over vav.
refuni: vav sheva het patah yod dagesh patah revia yod
changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam het patah yod dagesh patah revia yod
notes: BHL has a geresh muqdam over the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Replace meteg under mem with merkha.
refuni: vav segol geresh-muqdam alef hataf-segol mem meteg vav dagesh nun qamats tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
changeuni: vav segol geresh-muqdam alef hataf-segol mem merkha vav dagesh nun qamats tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
notes: The mark under the mem has sufficient northeast-to-southwest inclination to be transcribed as a merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the mem. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under the mem to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: mem dehi vav holam shin shin-dot tsere lamed
changeuni: mem tipeha vav holam shin shin-dot tsere lamed
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the mem is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a dehi under the mem. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Move pazer from het to zayin.
refuni: bet sheva het qamats pazer zayin vav holam final-nun
changeuni: bet sheva het qamats zayin pazer vav holam final-nun
notes: BHL has a pazer over the zayin. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move meteg from under the nun to under the kaf. The meteg follows the tsere. Remove CGJ.
refuni: lamed hiriq shin shin-dot sheva kaf tsere nun meteg combining-grapheme-joiner qamats yod vav sof-pasuq
changeuni: lamed hiriq shin shin-dot sheva kaf tsere meteg nun qamats yod vav sof-pasuq
notes: BHL has a qamats followed by meteg under the nun. BHL Appendix A has a tsere followed by meteg under the kaf and a qamats under the nun.

description: Change dehi under alef to tipeha.
refuni: alef dehi vav holam resh
changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam resh
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the mem is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a tipeha (acting as a tarha) under the alef. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under first vav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi shin shin-dot sheva mem vav dagesh alef tsere lamed
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha shin shin-dot sheva mem vav dagesh alef tsere lamed
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the vav is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively. This is a difficult transcription because the vav is so narrow.
BHL has a dehi under the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move meteg from tav to nun. The meteg follows the qamats.
refuni: alef hataf-segol mem vav dagesh nun qamats tav meteg vav holam sof-pasuq
changeuni: alef hataf-segol mem vav dagesh nun qamats meteg tav vav holam sof-pasuq
notes: The nun and tav are intertwined; however, space is available to position the meteg more distinctly under the tav.
BHL has a meteg under the tav. BHL Appendix A has the meteg following the qamats under the nun.

description: Change tipeha under he to dehi.
refuni: he tipeha vav dagesh alef
changeuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark is sufficiently offset to the right to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the he. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under ayin to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: ayin dehi vav holam lamed qamats final-mem
changeuni: ayin tipeha vav holam lamed qamats final-mem
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the mem is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a dehi under the ayin. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under he to tipeha.
refuni: he dehi vav holam dalet
changeuni: he tipeha vav holam dalet
notes: BHL has a tipeha under the he. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg to tipeha under yod.
refuni: yod patah meteg ayin patah mem sheva dalet vav dagesh maqaf
changeuni: yod patah tipeha ayin patah mem sheva dalet vav dagesh maqaf
notes: The diagonal mark under the yod is thicker than expected and not of uniform width; it may be a result of a correction. The ascender of a lamed on the following line precludes positioning the tipeha immediately after the patah. Space is available, however, to write a dehi prepositively if that had been the intent.
BHL has a patah then tipeha under the yod. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Add meteg under first vav. Remove meteg under bet. Add merkha under second vav. Add note 't'.
refuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot vav dagesh bet meteg vav dagesh final-nun sof-pasuq
changeuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot vav dagesh meteg bet vav dagesh merkha final-nun sof-pasuq
notes: The accents on this word are unexpected.
The first near-vertical line is midway between the shin and the first vav. It will be transcribed as a meteg under the first vav.
The second diagonal line has excellent northeast-to-southwest inclination to be considered a merkha; it is midway between the bet and the second vav. It will be transcribed as a merkha under the vav.
BHL has metegs under both the shin and the bet. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg under mem to merkha.
refuni: bet dagesh sheva mem patah meteg ayin patah lamed sheva lamed tsere yod he segol meteg final-mem sof-pasuq
changeuni: bet dagesh sheva mem patah merkha ayin patah lamed sheva lamed tsere yod he segol meteg final-mem sof-pasuq
notes: The diagonal line under the mem has a clear northeast-to-southwest inclination and will be transcribed as a merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the mem. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move mahapakh from resh to bet. Add meteg to resh. Add note 't'.
refuni: bet dagesh qamats resh mahapakh vav dagesh final-kaf sheva maqaf
changeuni: bet dagesh qamats mahapakh resh meteg vav dagesh final-kaf sheva maqaf
notes: The marking under the bet and resh is very confusing.
A mahapakh is apparent between the bet and the resh; it will be transcribed on the bet.
A nearly-vertical line appears under the resh; it will be transcribed as a meteg.
With these two understandings, an odd mark connecting the mahapakh and the meteg remains.
BHL has a qamats then mahapakh under the bet and a meteg under the resh. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg to merkha under second vav. Add note 't'.
refuni: vav dagesh meteg geresh-muqdam mem tsere ayin hataf-patah vav holam-haser meteg nun holam tav tsere yod he segol revia final-mem
changeuni: vav dagesh meteg geresh-muqdam mem tsere ayin hataf-patah vav holam-haser merkha nun holam tav tsere yod he segol revia final-mem
notes: A reddish dot appears under the yod. It will be considered a defect and ignored.
The revia above the he is not very dark and above its expected position.
BHL has a merkha under the second vav. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Add ole over alef.
refuni: alef segol ayin sheva lamed holam merkha zayin qamats he
changeuni: alef segol ole ayin sheva lamed holam merkha zayin qamats he
notes: The sheva under the ayin is smeared.
BHL has an ole over the alef. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under the he to tipeha.
refuni: he dehi vav holam shin shin-dot hiriq yod ayin tsere munah nun hiriq yod
changeuni: he tipeha vav holam shin shin-dot hiriq yod ayin tsere munah nun hiriq yod
notes: BHL has a tipeha under the he. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under the dalet to tipeha.
refuni: dalet dagesh dehi vav holam resh
changeuni: dalet dagesh tipeha vav holam resh
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the dalet is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a tipeha under the dalet. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under kaf to tipeha.
refuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi lamed
changeuni: kaf dagesh holam tipeha lamed
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the kaf is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a tipeha under the kaf. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Change dehi under kaf to tipeha.
refuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi lamed
changeuni: kaf dagesh holam tipeha lamed
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the kaf is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a tipeha under the kaf. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Add ole above alef.
refuni: vav patah yod dagesh qamats atnah-hafukh alef segol resh
changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh qamats atnah-hafukh alef segol ole resh
notes: BHL has a qamats followed by atnah-hafukh on the yod and an ole above the alef. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under lamed to tipeha.
refuni: lamed holam dehi alef
changeuni: lamed holam tipeha alef
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the kaf is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a tipeha under the lamed. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change meteg under the shin to merkha.
refuni: tav dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam shin shin-dot meteg vav dagesh ayin qamats tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
changeuni: tav dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam shin shin-dot merkha vav dagesh ayin qamats tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
notes: The merkha appears to have been written over a meteg.
BHL has a merkha under the shin. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Add maqaf at end of word.
refuni: lamed sheva meteg kaf qamats lamed
changeuni: lamed sheva meteg kaf qamats lamed maqaf
notes: BHL has a maqaf at the end of the word. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Remove revia over the kaf. Add note 't'.
refuni: kaf dagesh tsere geresh-muqdam revia final-nun
changeuni: kaf dagesh tsere geresh-muqdam final-nun
notes: A split geresh-muqdam is apparent over the kaf. The smeared area after it might be taken as a revia; however, the evidence is too weak to transcribe a revia over the kaf.
BHL has geresh-muqdam followed by a revia over the kaf. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Replace meteg under first tav with merkha.
refuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam tav meteg vav holam resh qamats tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam tav merkha vav holam resh qamats tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
notes: BHL has a merkha under the first tav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move revia from over tav to over the kaf.
refuni: mem hiriq geresh-muqdam tsadi sheva vav holam-haser tav segol revia yod final-kaf qamats
changeuni: mem hiriq geresh-muqdam tsadi sheva vav holam-haser tav segol yod final-kaf qamats revia
notes: No revia is apparent over the tav. A revia is mixed with a rafe over the kaf.
BHL has a revia over the tav and has no revia over the kaf. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under vav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi resh sheva alef tsere he
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha resh sheva alef tsere he
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the kaf is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a dehi under the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Move ole from mem to ayin.
refuni: he patah meteg mem dagesh patah ole ayin hataf-patah lamed merkha vav holam tav
changeuni: he patah meteg mem dagesh patah ayin hataf-patah ole lamed merkha vav holam tav
notes: BHL has an ole over the ayin. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Change dehi under vav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi mem holam pe sheva tav hiriq yod final-mem
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha mem holam pe sheva tav hiriq yod final-mem
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the kaf is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the vav. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change merkha under bet to meteg.
refuni: tav dagesh hiriq dalet sheva bet dagesh patah merkha qof maqaf
changeuni: tav dagesh hiriq dalet sheva bet dagesh patah meteg qof maqaf
notes: BHL has a patah then meteg under the bet. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Move ole from alef to first kaf.
refuni: alef segol ole zayin sheva kaf dagesh sheva resh tsere merkha kaf hiriq yod
changeuni: alef segol zayin sheva kaf dagesh sheva ole resh tsere merkha kaf hiriq yod
notes: BHL has no ole over the alef; it has an ole over the first kaf. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change merkha under kaf to meteg. Add maqaf at end of word.
refuni: kaf dagesh hiriq merkha yod
changeuni: kaf dagesh hiriq meteg yod maqaf
notes: BHL has a hiriq then meteg under the kaf. BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Change dehi under the alef to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: alef holam dehi yod sheva bet patah yod
changeuni: alef holam tipeha yod sheva bet patah yod
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the kaf is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available to position the mark prepositively.
BHL has a dehi under the alef. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Remove maqaf at end of word.
refuni: kaf dagesh sheva meteg mem vav holam maqaf
changeuni: kaf dagesh sheva meteg mem vav holam
notes: BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHL Appendix A has no note for this verse.

description: Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: yod sheva meteg dalet patah bet dagesh segol ole resh maqaf
changeuni: yod sheva meteg dalet patah bet dagesh segol ole resh
notes: BHL has no maqaf at the end of this word. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Change dehi under he to tipeha.
refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
changeuni: he tipeha vav dagesh alef
notes: The dehi/tipeha mark under the he is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a tipeha under the he. BHL Appendix A has no note on this verse.

description: Change merkha to meteg.
refuni: resh merkha vav dagesh het patah maqaf
changeuni: resh meteg vav dagesh het patah maqaf
notes: BHL has a meteg under the resh. BHL Appendix A makes no comment on this verse.

description: Add maqaf at end of word.
refuni: tav dagesh sheva meteg alef tsere he hataf-patah bet ole vav dagesh
changeuni: tav dagesh sheva meteg alef tsere he hataf-patah bet ole vav dagesh maqaf
notes: The maqaf between the vav of this word and the pe of the following word is clear.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove maqaf at end of word.
refuni: vav sheva meteg yod patah ayin hataf-patah lamed patah ole tav maqaf
changeuni: vav sheva meteg yod patah ayin hataf-patah lamed patah ole tav
notes: No maqaf is present between this word's tav and the following word's het.
BHL has no maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Add maqaf at end of word.
refuni: vav sheva he segol het hataf-segol zayin hiriq munah yod qof qamats he
changeuni: vav sheva he segol het hataf-segol zayin hiriq munah yod qof qamats he maqaf
notes: BHL has no maqaf on this word; BHLA has a maqaf on this word with a '?' in parentheses.

description: Change mark under the tet to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: tet dehi vav holam bet
changeuni: tet tipeha vav holam bet
notes: The mark under the tet isn't sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available for it to be made prepositive. Adding a note 'd'.
The Aleppo Codex and BHL have a dehi under the tet. BHLA makes no comment on this verse.

description: Change dehi under the mem to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: mem dehi vav dagesh samekh qamats resh
changeuni: mem tipeha vav dagesh samekh qamats resh
notes: The mark under the mem is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi, although space is available to do so.
BHA has a dehi below the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change dehi under bet to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam tet segol he
changeuni: bet dagesh tipeha vav holam tet segol he
notes: The mark under the bet isn't sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Adding note 'd'.
The Aleppo Codex and BHL have a dehi under the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change dehi under alef to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: alef holam dehi kaf segol lamed
changeuni: alef holam tipeha kaf segol lamed
notes: The mark under the alef is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Space is available write the mark prepositively. Add note 'd'.
The Aleppo Codex and the BHL have a dehi under the alef. BHLA has a tipeha under the alef.

description: Add maqaf to end of word.
refuni: ayin holam munah shin shin-dot tsere meteg qof
changeuni: ayin holam munah shin shin-dot tsere meteg qof maqaf
notes: BHL has no maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has a maqaf at the end of this word.

description: Change dehi under shin to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: shin shin-dot holam dehi mem patah ayin patah tav
changeuni: shin shin-dot holam tipeha mem patah ayin patah tav
notes: The mark under the shin is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
The Aleppo Codex and BHL have a dehi under the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove revia over the alef.
refuni: alef patah geresh-muqdam revia final-pe
changeuni: alef patah geresh-muqdam final-pe
notes: BHL has no revia over the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change dehi under tav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: tav dagesh dehi vav holam ayin segol he
changeuni: tav dagesh tipeha vav holam ayin segol he
notes: The mark under the tav is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
The Aleppo Codex and BHL have a dehi under the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change dehi under vav to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi shin shin-dot sheva mem patah ayin
changeuni: vav dagesh tipeha shin shin-dot sheva mem patah ayin
notes: The mark under the vav is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Add note 'd'.
The Aleppo Codex and BHL have a dehi under the vav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Add dagesh to mem. Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: kaf dagesh sheva mem vav holam maqaf
changeuni: kaf dagesh sheva mem dagesh vav holam
notes: The text has poor quality; however, the dagesh in the mem and lack of maqaf are clear.
BHL has no dagesh in the mem and no maqaf at the end of the word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change merkha under yod to munah.
refuni: bet dagesh sheva mem patah shin sin-dot sheva kaf dagesh hiriq yod dagesh merkha vav holam tav
changeuni: bet dagesh sheva mem patah shin sin-dot sheva kaf dagesh hiriq yod dagesh munah vav holam tav
notes: The accent under the yod is clearly a munah rather than a merkha.
BHL has a munah under the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change meteg under resh to merkha.
refuni: resh tsere meteg ayin hataf-patah final-kaf qamats qadma
changeuni: resh tsere merkha ayin hataf-patah final-kaf qamats qadma
notes: The line under the resh has a northeast-to-southwest inclination of a merkha. The kaf has two near-vertical marks above it; the first of them is a meteg on the the word יְשַׂמַּֽח־ from the preceding line, verse 27:9.3 .
BHL has a merkha under the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove markings under the gimel; examine a possible maqaf at the end of word. Add note 't'.
refuni: gimel dagesh segol munah bet segol resh
changeuni: gimel dagesh bet segol resh
notes: The text is in very bad shape in this region. The markings under the gimel are uncertain and will be removed. No maqaf is visible at the end. Adding note 't'.
BHL has a segol then munah under the gimel and no maqaf at the end. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change meteg below gimel to merkha. Remove maqaf at end of word.
refuni: gimel dagesh patah meteg final-mem maqaf
changeuni: gimel dagesh patah merkha final-mem
notes: The line under the gimel has a very slight northeast-to-southwest inclination and can be transcribed as a merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the gimel and no maqaf at the end of the word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change merkha under he to meteg. Add note 'm'.
refuni: nun hiriq meteg bet hataf-qamats he qamats merkha lamed
changeuni: nun hiriq meteg bet hataf-qamats he qamats meteg lamed
notes: The line under the he lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination to be transcribed as a merkha.
BHL has a meteg under the nun and a merkha under the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change munah under kaf to meteg.
refuni: shin shin-dot tsere kaf qamats munah resh
changeuni: shin shin-dot tsere kaf qamats meteg resh
notes: The line under the kaf has insufficient northeast-to-southwest inclination to be transcribed as a merkha. It's clearly not a munah, however.
BHL has a munah under the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove maqaf from end of word. Add note 'm'.
refuni: vav sheva tav meteg vav holam resh patah tav maqaf
changeuni: vav sheva tav meteg vav holam resh patah tav
notes: The line under the first tav lacks sufficient northeast-to-southwest inclination to be transcribed as a merkha. Adding note 'm'.
BHL has no maqaf at the end of this word; however, it has a merkha under the first tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Add revia above the mem. Add note 'c'.
refuni: vav sheva kaf hiriq yod mem tsere tipeha yod
changeuni: vav sheva kaf hiriq yod mem tsere tipeha revia yod
notes: The markings above the mem are confusing. The rightmost group is possibly a broken masora circle; however, a very clear, dark dot appears on the left. If the dot above the mem is taken as a revia, then the mem has two accents, a tipeha and a revia, which is very strange.
BHL has no revia above the mem. BHLA has both a revia and tipeha on the mem.

description: Remove meteg under the mem. Add note 't'.
refuni: ayin hiriq mem dagesh meteg vav holam sof-pasuq
changeuni: ayin hiriq mem dagesh vav holam sof-pasuq
notes: No meteg is present under the mem.
BHL has a meteg under the mem. BHLA has no meteg under the mem and has a '?' in parentheses.

description: Remove meteg under pe. Add note 't'.
refuni: kaf dagesh patah pe dagesh qamats meteg yod sof-pasuq
changeuni: kaf dagesh patah pe dagesh qamats yod sof-pasuq
notes: No meteg is apparent under the pe.
BHL has a meteg under the pe. BHLA has no meteg under the pe and a '?' in parentheses.

description: Change dehi under vav to meteg; change merkha under tav to meteg with an 'm' note.
refuni: vav dagesh dehi lamed sheva het patah tet dagesh qamats alef tav hiriq merkha yod
changeuni: vav dagesh meteg lamed sheva het patah tet dagesh qamats alef tav hiriq meteg yod
notes: The mark under the vav, currently transcribed as a dehi, is not sufficiently inclined to be taken as either a tipeha or dehi. The dehi in the previous text will be transcribed as a meteg. The merkha under the tav is not sufficiently inclined to be transcribed as a merkha. The merkha in the previous text will be transcribed as a meteg with an 'm' note.
BHL has a meteg under the vav and a merkha under the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: vav sheva alef segol tav maqaf
changeuni: vav sheva alef segol tav
notes: BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no maqaf at the end of this word.

description: Change meteg under alef to tipeha.
refuni: vav sheva alef tsere meteg tav qamats nun hiriq munah yod final-mem
changeuni: vav sheva alef tsere tipeha tav qamats nun hiriq munah yod final-mem
notes: The mark under the alef is clearly inclined northwest-to-southeast.
BHL has a tipeha under the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change merkha under shin to meteg. Add note 'm'.
refuni: tav dagesh qamats mahapakh shin shin-dot hiriq merkha yod tav
changeuni: tav dagesh qamats mahapakh shin shin-dot hiriq meteg yod tav
notes: The line under the shin lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination to be transcribed as a merkha. Adding note 'm'.
The mark under the second tav in the image is from the word הֲיִ֫חְיֶ֥ה, Prov 14:14.4, on the following line.
BHL has a merkha under the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Add merkha after meteg on shin.
refuni: shin shin-dot holam meteg het patah dalet sof-pasuq
changeuni: shin shin-dot holam meteg merkha het patah dalet sof-pasuq
notes: The merkha is well-inclined and distinct from the meteg.
BHL has only a meteg under the shin. BHLA has a meteg followed by a merkha under the shin.

description: Remove munah under the yod. Add note 't'.
refuni: vav sheva yod qamats munah lamed holam dalet
changeuni: vav sheva yod qamats lamed holam dalet
notes: The text is in bad condition and poorly written near this word. A munah under the yod is not evident and will be removed. A meteg under the lamed (seen in BHL) isn't evident, either. A transcription note 't' will be added drawing attention to both the yod and the lamed.
BHL has a qamats then munah under the yod and a meteg under the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change dehi under alef to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: alef dehi vav holam resh
changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam resh
notes: The accent below the alef isn't sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi. Add note 'd'.
BHL has a dehi below the alef. BHLA has a tipeha below the alef.

description: Change meteg under shin to merkha.
refuni: vav dagesh geresh-muqdam tav sheva shin shin-dot meteg vav dagesh bet holam tav tsere yod kaf segol revia final-mem
changeuni: vav dagesh geresh-muqdam tav sheva shin shin-dot merkha vav dagesh bet holam tav tsere yod kaf segol revia final-mem
notes: The mark below the shin has the distinct northeast-to-southwest inclination of a merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change dehi below alef to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: alef dehi vav holam mem segol resh
changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam mem segol resh
notes: The mark below the alef is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the alef. BHLA has a tipeha under the alef.

description: Change meteg under first bet to merkha.
refuni: bet dagesh patah meteg mem dagesh hiriq dalet sheva bet dagesh qamats revia resh
changeuni: bet dagesh patah merkha mem dagesh hiriq dalet sheva bet dagesh qamats revia resh
notes: The mark under the first bet has a distinct northeast-to-southwest inclination.
BHL has a merkha under the first bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: het patah yod maqaf
changeuni: het patah yod
notes: No maqaf is apparent between the yod of this word and the following alef.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no maqaf at the end of this word.

description: Change dehi under resh to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: resh dehi vav dagesh het patah
changeuni: resh tipeha vav dagesh het patah
notes: The mark under the resh is not sufficiently prepositive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Move meteg from under alef to under vav.
refuni: mem qubuts alef meteg vav dagesh final-mem sof-pasuq
changeuni: mem qubuts alef vav dagesh meteg final-mem sof-pasuq
notes: BHL has only a meteg (acting as a siluq) under the mem; it has no qubuts under the mem. The BHLA has a meteg (acting as a siluq) on the vav.

description: Change merkha under mem to meteg. Add note 'm'.
refuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam ole alef mem patah merkha resh
changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam ole alef mem patah meteg resh
notes: The vertical mark under the mem lacks sufficient northeast-to-southwest inclination to be transcribed as a merkha. Adding note 'm'. The author points out the possible traces of a sof pasuq at the end of the word. If the verse had ended with this word, as suggested by the traces of the sof pasuq, then a meteg acting as a siluq would have been expected.
BHL has a merkha under the mem. BHLA has no entry for this word, word 6; it does have an entry for word 11.

description: Move hiriq under the second shin to follow the etnachta using a ZWJ.
refuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot hiriq etnachta yod final-mem
changeuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot etnachta ZWJ hiriq yod final-mem
notes: The etnachta clearly precedes the hiriq under the second shin.
BHL has the hiriq before the etnachta under the second shin. BHLA has the hiriq following the etnachta under the second shin.
changeuni_gen: yod sheva shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot etnahta zero-width-joiner hiriq yod final-mem

description: Remove maqaf from end of word.
refuni: lamed holam munah alef maqaf
changeuni: lamed holam munah alef
notes: BHL has no maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Move ole from over yod to over ayin.
refuni: vav sheva meteg yod patah ole ayin hataf-patah bet holam merkha dalet vav dagesh
changeuni: vav sheva meteg yod patah ayin hataf-patah ole bet holam merkha dalet vav dagesh
notes: The ole is clearly over the ayin.
BHL has an ole over the ayin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change merkha under lamed to meteg. Add note 'm'. Remove maqaf at end of word.
refuni: lamed holam merkha alef maqaf
changeuni: lamed holam meteg alef maqaf
notes: A maqaf may have been erased at the end of this word. The erasure has "dented" the top of the nun.

notes: The image shows both this word, word 5, and its successor. The vertical accent under the bet has a very slight tail to the left. It also has a very slight northeast-to-southwest inclination. Thus it will be transcribed as a merkha. No maqaf appears at the end of this word, word 5.
BHL has a merkha under the bet and no maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove munah under zayin. Add accent segol to het.
refuni: zayin segol munah bet patah het
changeuni: zayin segol bet patah het segol
notes: The image includes the following word, הבקר, as part of the discussion below. No munah appears under the zayin. The accent segol on the het is clear. The revia over the following word is also evident.
BHL has no munah under the zayin; it has an accent segol on the het. On the next word BHL has a revia over the qof. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

A potentially "consensus" pointing for this word pair is munah then segol with the munah under the zayin of the first word and a segol over the resh of the second word. Of interest are the erasure splotches in the image under the zayin of the first word and over the resh of the second word. This suggests a delibrate correction of the LC by a scribe contrary to the "consensus" pointing. BHL, as expected, reflects the actual LC pointing of both words. BHS has a munah then revia pointing of the two words; agreeing with the "consensus" on the first word and the LC on the second. The pre-change UXLC pointing of the first word with a munah under the zayin and a revia over the resh probably reflects the pointing of the BHS from which the WLC was transcribed.

BHL has a tipeha under the pe. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

BHL has a hiriq then munah under the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh patah shin shin-dot sheva lamed hiriq yod kaf merkha vav dagesh final-mem

description: Remove maqaf from ketiv word.

changeuni: mem final-nun

Words 2, 3, 4 of the UXLC represent both the LC body text and the qere consonants; words 3, 4 contain the ketiv variants for this image; UXLC word 2 is the first ketiv variant, shown in the Reference/Change above. No maqaf is present between the final nun and the following bet in the image. This change removes the maqaf from the UXLC ketiv word in position 2, מן־ .

The tsere, merkha pointings under the lamed belong to the second qere whose letters, כן, are shown in the left margin along with the Masoretic note: qere and no ketiv.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no maqaf at the end of this word.

description: Move meteg from nun to qere yod.

changeuni: bet dagesh sheva nun qamats yod meteg vav holam tav sof-pasuq

The word in question is the qere variant and its letters are shown in the margin of the LC; they're in the expected yod then vav order. In the body text image above the meteg (acting as a siluq) is clearly under the ketiv vav (the qere yod) and not the nun. Hence, in the qere the meteg belongs under the yod. Here the writer has carefully displaced the meteg away from the foot of the nun to avoid confusion.

changeuni: mem qamats meteg dalet qamats yod alef qamats zaqef-qatan
notes: Example from BHL "Qere and Ketiv", p. xxi, third of Dotan's 4 qere cases: "obliged to add a qere" (Aramaic). This word has neither a qere nor yatir Masoretic note. It also lacks any Masoretic note; however, Dotan ascribes the lack of note to "scribe's negligence". The circle under the yod is the Masoretic circle for a word on the following line. In the image the qamats and zaqef-qatan are on the alef, not the yod. Both will be moved to the alef in the UXLC. The letters of the ketiv body text will be retained.
BHL has inserted a qere word ending in alef he, מָֽדָאָ֔ה, instead of the marked body text, מָֽדָיָ֔א. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove unsupported maqaf at end of qere word. Add note 'q'. [מַה־]

changeuni: mem patah he
notes: The image shows words 5 and 6 of this verse. The qere letters for this word (מה) and its successor (זה) appear on separate lines in the left margin; no maqaf appears these letters. No maqaf is apparent in the ketiv letters (מזה) of the body text shown in the image. The letter he of this word is not in the ketiv letters but is taken from the qere letters for this word. Add note 'q'.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this qere word, מַה־. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove unsupported maqaf from qere word. Add note 'q'. [מַה־]
refuni: mem patah he maqaf
changeuni: mem patah he
notes: The qere word, מה, and its qere successor, לכם, are on separate lines in the left margin. No maqaf is apparent in the ketiv body.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word, showing the present text, מַה־לָּכֶם֙. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove unsupported maqaf from qere word. Add note 'q'. [וְהִנֵּה־]

changeuni: vav sheva he hiriq nun dagesh tsere he
notes: The qere word, והנה, and its successor, הוא, are shown in separate lines in the left margin. No maqaf is apparent in the ketiv body text, והנהו. One understanding of the qere/ketiv pair is that the qere inserts a he after the nun in the ketiv word to form והנה; then inserts an alef at the end of the ketiv word to form הוא, the second word the qere.
BHL has the present text, וְהִנֵּה־ה֛וּא, as the qere word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam merkha alef mem segol merkha resh space paseq
notes: The ink is chipped in this area; however, the remnant of a mark remains following the segol. The mark has the northeast-to-southwest inclination of a merkha. Add transcription note 't'. This word appears in a response to Jason Hare's b-hebrew/Hebrew Bible posting "What about Ktiv / Kri ?" of 28 Sep 2024 by Ben Denckla on 29 Sep 2024.
BHL has no accent under the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

Add note'm' to signify the meteg/merkha uncertainty of this accent. This word appears in a response to Jason Hare's b-hebrew/Hebrew Bible posting "What about Ktiv / Kri ?" of 28 Sep 2024 by Ben Denckla on 29 Sep 2024.
BHL has a merkha following the patah under the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Add merka following segol under the mem.
refuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam merkha alef mem segol resh space paseq
changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam merkha alef mem segol merkha resh space paseq
notes: The mark following the segol under the mem has a very slight northeast-to-southwest inclination and will be transcribed as a merkha. The mark under the yod is a marginal merkha. This word appears in a response to Jason Hare's b-hebrew/Hebrew Bible posting "What about Ktiv / Kri ?" of 28 Sep 2024 by Ben Denckla on 29 Sep 2024.
BHL has a meteg following the segol under the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove maqaf at end of word. (Rework of 2023.10.19 - Changes.xml, 2023.06.10 - 43)
refuni: lamed holam meteg alef maqaf
changeuni: lamed holam meteg alef
notes: A previous change, 2023.10.19 - Changes.xml, 2023.06.10 - 43, intended to remove the maqaf but failed to do so. The maqaf is removed with this change. [The '!' is a special marker to ensure that the transcription note 'm' is properly placed.]
BHL has a merkha under the lamed and no maqaf at the end of the word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine the marking under the vav and for a maqaf at end of word. Change the mark under the vav to meteg. Add note 'm'.
refuni: vav dagesh merkha tav sheva he hiriq yod
changeuni: vav dagesh meteg tav sheva he hiriq yod
notes: The line under the vav lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination to be a merkha. It's also rather short for a merkha. Change to meteg and add transcription note 'm'. There is no maqaf at end of this word.
BHL has a merkha under the vav and no maqaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine maqaf-linked pair for accents. Replace meteg under kaf with merkha. Add note 'c' as the accent under the kaf could be taken as a meteg elsewhere.
refuni: resh tsere meteg yod ayin hataf-patah kaf segol meteg final-mem sof-pasuq
changeuni: resh tsere meteg yod ayin hataf-patah kaf segol merkha final-mem sof-pasuq
notes: The preceding word has no accent and a connecting maqaf; the accent is on this word. The mark under the kaf is heavily inclined northeast-to-southwest and must be transcribed as a merkha in the UXLC. Add a transcription note 'c'.
BHL has no accent on the preceding word and a meteg under the resh and a meteg under the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine accent under shin. Change merkha to meteg. Add note 'm'.
refuni: vav sheva shin shin-dot merkha vav dagesh bet vav dagesh
changeuni: vav sheva shin shin-dot meteg vav dagesh bet vav dagesh
notes: This is the qere word of a qere/ketiv pair. The accent under the shin is too vertical to be considered a merkha here. Change merkha to meteg and add note 'm'.
BHL has a merkha under the shin; otherwise, it agrees with BHL. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: * Examine for revia above the bet. Remove revia.
refuni: ayin patah geresh-muqdam kaf dagesh qamats bet hiriq revia yod shin shin-dot
changeuni: ayin patah geresh-muqdam kaf dagesh qamats bet hiriq yod shin shin-dot
notes: The text has a rafe above the bet. (The UXLC doesn't usually display rafe marks.) Remove the revia.
BHL has a revia above the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine accent under yod (meteg, dehi). Change meteg to dehi.
refuni: yod holam meteg nun patah qof sheva tav dagesh merkha vav holam
changeuni: yod holam dehi nun patah qof sheva tav dagesh merkha vav holam
notes: The mark under the yod has a distinct northwest-to-southeast inclination and is displaced forward of the centerline of the yod. The mark under the yod is a dehi.
BHL has a meteg under the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine markings under the first yod. Change meteg to merkha and add transcription note 'c'.
refuni: ayin qamats nun sheva yod meteg CGJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq
changeuni: ayin qamats nun sheva yod merkha ZWJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq
notes: Under the first yod is a sloping line followed by a hiriq. The line slopes significantly in the northeast-to-southwest orientation as a merkha. Although the accent probably was intended to be a meteg, the UXLC transcription must make it a merkha for consistency.
BHL has a hiriq, then meteg under the first yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.
refuni_gen: ayin qamats nun sheva yod meteg combining-grapheme-joiner hiriq yod sof-pasuq
changeuni_gen: ayin qamats nun sheva yod merkha zero-width-joiner hiriq yod sof-pasuq

description: Examine if pe has a geresh-muqdam and a revia. [Part 2 of previous change] Change accent order to revia then geresh-muqdam; include ZWJ to achieve display or ordering. Add transcription note 't'.
refuni: pe hiriq geresh-muqdam revia yod
changeuni: pe hiriq revia ZWJ geresh-muqdam yod
notes: The image shows both parts of a maqaf-joined pair, this word is the second in the pair. A geresh-muqdam over the pe is clear; it is preceded by a small dot that may be a revia. Add transcription note 't'. Note that the putative revia appears before the geresh-muqdam in the image. Place the revia before the gerseh-muqdam; adding a zero-width-joiner (ZWJ, x200d) between them to achieve the ordering in the display.
BHL has a geresh-muqdam and a revia in that order. BHLA has no entry for this verse.
changeuni_gen: pe hiriq revia zero-width-joiner geresh-muqdam yod

description: Examine accent below the alef: dehi or tipeha. Change dehi to tipeha.
refuni: alef dehi vav holam bet tsere dalet
changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam bet tsere dalet
notes: The accent below the alef is not sufficiently pre-positive to be considered a dehi and space was available to make it more pre-positive. The accent will be changed to a tipeha.
BHL has a dehi below the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine accent under the he: dehi or tipeha.
refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
changeuni: he tipeha vav dagesh alef
notes: The image shows this word and the preceding word. The maqaf between these two words is hardly visible. The mark under the he is not sufficiently pre-positive to be considered a dehi. Change dehi to tipeha and add note 'd'.
BHL has a dehi under the he; it has a maqaf between this word and the preceding word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine accent on alef: meteg or merkha. Change merkha to meteg under the alef. Add note 'm'.
refuni: alef patah merkha nun hataf-patah shin shin-dot tsere merkha yod
changeuni: alef patah meteg nun hataf-patah shin shin-dot tsere merkha yod
notes: The accent on the alef is a meteg; it lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination of a merkha. Change merkha to meteg. Add note 'm' because BHL sees a merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Examine accent on shin: dehi or tipeha. Change dehi to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
refuni: shin shin-dot holam dehi alef qamats he
changeuni: shin shin-dot holam tipeha alef qamats he
notes: The accent below the shin isn't sufficiently pre-positive to be taken as a dehi. Change to tipeha and add note 'd'.
BHL has a dehi under the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: * Examine accent over tav: revia or geresh. Change revia to geresh.
refuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam yod qamats dalet patah ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats revia
changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam yod qamats dalet patah ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats geresh
notes: The accent above the tav looks like it might have been a revia and then corrected to be a geresh. Change the revia to a geresh.
BHL has a revia over the tav. BHLA has a geresh over the tav.

description: Change munah to mahapakh under the pe.
refuni: resh hiriq pe dagesh hiriq munah yod nun vav dagesh
changeuni: resh hiriq pe dagesh hiriq mahapakh yod nun vav dagesh
notes: In the body text the last letter may appear to be a single ayin; however, the last two two letters of this word are nun, vav, as seen from the qere letters in the margin. The mahapakh is very clear.
BHL has a mahapakh under the pe. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Change qadma over tsadi to pashta.
refuni: alef hataf-patah resh hiriq yod tsadi segol qadma nun dagesh vav dagesh pashta
changeuni: alef hataf-patah resh hiriq yod tsadi segol pashta nun dagesh vav dagesh pashta
notes: A pashta is a post-fix accent. When two post-fix accents occur in the same word the first post-fix accent is called an "accent helper" because it shows where the accent is actually to be placed in the word. The shift from a qadma accent to a pasha accent requires a leftward shift of the symbol by one half of the letter's width. It's NOT perceptible with some fonts.
BHL has a distinct pashta over the tsadi. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove qadma from nun, place pashta on yod.
refuni: vav patah alef dalet holam nun hiriq qadma yod
changeuni: vav patah alef dalet holam nun hiriq yod pashta
notes: The accent is clearly on the yod, not the nun. The mark is post-positive and should be a pashta rather than a qadma.
BHL has a qadma on the nun. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

description: Remove qadma on resh; place a pashta on the final vav.
refuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam meteg alef mem sheva resh qadma vav dagesh
changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh holam meteg alef mem sheva resh vav dagesh pashta
notes: The accent is on the vav and must be a pashta. Do not mistake the tipeha of Judges 21:15.7 on the preceding line as being a pashta/qadma. This change proposal was suggested by results from a run of Richard Goerwitz's accent grammar checker on a recent (2020) Groves Center text. For more information, see Ben Denckla's "Goerwitz Run on WLC" at https://bdenckla.github.io/wlc-utils/accgram/goerwitz.html.
BHL has a qadma over the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

changeuni: yod hiriq darga resh segol bet
notes: The photo facsimile shows no accent over the resh.

BHL has no gershayim in this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse. This change proposal was suggested by results from a run of Richard Goerwitz's accent grammar checker on a recent (2020) Groves Center text. For more information, see Ben Denckla's "Goerwitz Run on WLC" at https://bdenckla.github.io/wlc-utils/accgram/goerwitz.html.
BHL has a meteg under the dalet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.
